selection_goal: Older or smaller legacy models likely to benefit from bridge compatibility after NeMo ASR warm-worker hardening.

targets.first_smoke: Run inspect_request for each .nemo archive, then restore/load_only on CPU or cuda:0 for the smallest archive before adding catalog entries.

model_index_evidence.why_now: Warm worker contract is implemented; expansion is mostly archive target/import/transcribe validation.

targets.recommended_bridge: reuse scripts/nemo_asr_worker.py and NemoASRWarmClient with model-specific archive probes

targets.first_smoke: Implement a family matrix smoke that generates 4 tokens with slow tokenizer fallback and use_cache=false, starting with 125M/350M layer-share and 600M.

model_index_evidence.artifact: classic .bin/.model configs and newer safetensors variants present
model_index_evidence.catalog_seed: MobileLLM-125M and MobileLLM-350M already runnable in ai
model_index_evidence.why_now: Known tokenizer/cache shims should generalize across the family.

targets.recommended_bridge: legacy_model_bridge.runtime.causal_lm with tokenizer fallback, remote-code trust controls, use_cache=false, and generation result schema

targets.first_smoke: Load onnxruntime session, record input/output names/shapes/dtypes, and run synthetic silence or zero tensors through the graph without postprocess assumptions.

model_index_evidence.why_now: No heavy CUDA model construction; compatibility work is mostly tensor/schema normalization.

targets.recommended_bridge: new lightweight ONNX session bridge with input/output tensor inspection and preprocessing contract reports

targets.first_smoke: Run config/tokenizer/processor load, then one tiny forward pass or summarization/generation with max_new_tokens=4 for BART.

model_index_evidence.artifact: legacy .bin plus config/tokenizer files; some have safetensors mirrors
model_index_evidence.why_now: These are stable older Transformers formats that should run in ai with minimal shims.

targets.recommended_bridge: small AutoModel/AutoProcessor probes with config fallback and output schema per task

targets.first_smoke: MusicGen family and BigVGAN are verified in ai; next target is audiogen-medium load/generation or conversion adapter.

model_index_evidence.artifact: .bin/.pt models, EnCodec-style .model files, and BigVGAN source files present
model_index_evidence.verified_now: musicgen-small, musicgen-stereo-small, musicgen-stereo-medium, musicgen-large, musicgen-stereo-large, musicgen-stereo-melody-large, and bigvgan_v2_44khz_128band_512x have ai reports.
model_index_evidence.why_now: Smaller than world/video models and useful for audio pipeline compatibility.

targets.recommended_bridge: Transformers/AudioCraft-style audio generation bridge with bounded duration and sample-rate artifact contract
